description: Isabella source frame through ACES 1.3 vanilla HDR P3 1000-nit output transform.

source.notes: ACES 1.3 HDR P3 1000-nit ODT. OpenScope v1 does not apply transfer functions — treating PQ-encoded TIFF as rgba8unorm will produce scope readings in the PQ-encoded space, not linear light. Useful as a cross-pipeline visual check, not for quantitative conformance.

scopes.notes: Log Y scale. Resolve waveform for HDR content. AI-inferred crop; visual verification pending.
Log Y scale. AI-inferred crop; visual verification pending.
Vectorscope targets remain Rec.709 in Resolve UI even for P3 content unless explicitly changed. AI-inferred crop; visual verification pending.
Log X scale. AI-inferred crop; visual verification pending.
Not implemented in OpenScope v1. Points extend past Rec.709 triangle into P3 gamut. AI-inferred crop; visual verification pending.

annotationMeta.notes: Screenshot order assumed identical to variant 1. Verified first screenshot is Waveform. Note: OpenScope v1 has no PQ transfer-function support; this variant is a visual reference, not a conformance target.
